source_pr.title: executor: move testShowStatsSuite into SerialSuites
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fixes #14931

### What is changed and how it works?

move testShowStatsSuite into SerialSuites

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: PR body: move testShowStatsSuite into SerialSuites (Fixes #14931).
failure_signature: PR body: move testShowStatsSuite into SerialSuites (Fixes #14931).
root_cause_explanation: The suite likely relies on shared/global state (e.g., statistics/system tables) and was flaky when running in parallel with other suites. This PR registers testShowStatsSuite as SerialSuites so it runs serially, avoiding cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Move suite into SerialSuites to avoid parallel execution interference on shared state.

evidence: evidence: PR body: move testShowStatsSuite into SerialSuites (Fixes #14931).
evidence: diff changes testShowStatsSuite registration from Suite(...) to SerialSuites(...) to avoid parallel interference (executor/executor_test.go).
